introSection: Madagascar Mad Pursuit is a steel indoor launched roller coaster located at Motiongate in Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged 4 across in 2 rows for a total of 8 riders per car.

sections.title: Theme
sections.content: Madagascar Mad Pursuit is themed around the Madagascar animated films. It is themed so that the riders are trying to escape the animal catcher Blaise DuBoir from Madagascar 3.

fullText:
Madagascar Mad Pursuit is a steel indoor launched roller coaster located at Motiongate in Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.



Single car trains. Riders are arranged 4 across in 2 rows for a total of 8 riders per car.

Madagascar Mad Pursuit is themed around the Madagascar animated films. It is themed so that the riders are trying to escape the animal catcher Blaise DuBoir from Madagascar 3.
